summary: Iteration 2 — Tested new AI sales pitch feature (POST /api/pitch + comparison.tsx). Backend: 7/7 pitch tests pass (single competitor, multiple competitors, custom products, caching, invalid code 404, lines cite digits, /api/compare regression). Frontend: deep-linked to /comparison?code=K90&ids=... with seeded session, both pitch-toggle-0 and pitch-toggle-1 render, AI badge + Sales Pitch title visible, first card auto-expanded with 3 numbered lines, tapping toggle-1 collapses 0 and expands 1, Detailed Specifications table renders below. Real GPT-5.2 content with specific numerical comparisons (e.g. '4–5 hours pot life vs 3–4 hours—up to 25% more working time').

minor.issue: Backend logs show occasional 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.003227, Max budget: 0.001' from LiteLLM for some pitch generations. Endpoint still returns 200 because of deterministic fallback inside try/except. Fallback path does NOT cache, so a budget-exhausted competitor will hit the LLM (and fail) on every request. Consider (a) caching fallback too, OR (b) returning a clear 503/flag when LLM fails so UI can show retry. Currently invisible to user but inefficient.

issues: Console warnings still present: 'No route named auth-callback exists' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated'. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Cache the deterministic fallback pitch in db.pitch_cache so a budget-exceeded LLM call doesn't repeat on every request.
(Optional) Surface LLM failures to UI (e.g. small 'fallback pitch — retry for AI' note) instead of silently using fallback.
(Carryover) Clean up auth-callback Stack.Screen registration and migrate deprecated pointerEvents prop.
critical_code_review_comments: comparison.tsx useEffect has empty dependency [] but uses code/ids/custom from useLocalSearchParams — fine for this single-mount flow but would break if the screen ever re-uses params via router.replace.
/api/pitch fallback branch returns 200 with non-AI content; consider adding a 'source: ai|fallback' field in the response so frontend can distinguish.

Pitch cache key uses md5(kamdhenu_code|brand|name|is_type|en_type|v2). It does NOT include the actual params, so if seed data param values change, stale cached pitches will be served. Consider hashing the param dicts too.
seed_data_creation: None. Used dev_session_kamdhenu_2026 (auto-seeded). Pitch cache populated organically (6 entries verified in db.pitch_cache).
context_for_next_testing_agent: To test comparison screen quickly, set localStorage.session_token='dev_session_kamdhenu_2026' then navigate to /comparison?code=K90&ids=["myk_laticrete::6","mapei::8"]&custom=[]. Mongo db.pitch_cache stores cached pitches keyed by hash; clear with db.pitch_cache.deleteMany({}) to force re-generation. LLM key budget can throw 'Budget has been exceeded' — fallback pitches are deterministic strings about open time/coverage/standards.
rca_of_issue: No bugs. Feature works end-to-end. Only observed concern is the LLM budget intermittent error captured in backend.err.log (handled gracefully via fallback).
